name: unet-sdk
description: Developer-facing SDK packages for U-net web login and verification.

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run contracts:generate && tsc -b packages/* examples/react-login examples/react-age-check examples/checkout-bound-verification && mkdir -p packages/contracts/dist/generated && cp packages/contracts/src/generated/*.d.ts packages/contracts/dist/generated/
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/* examples/react-login examples/react-age-check examples/checkout-bound-verification --pretty false
